title: Ibiza 10-Day Nightlife Getaway
metaTitle: Ibiza 10-Day Nightlife Getaway | Flights, Hotels & Tours Included
metaDescription: Book a 10-day trip to Ibiza, Spain: round-trip flights, hotel, breakfast, transfers, and guided tours including Dalt Vila (walled old town) guided tour and Es Vedrà boat trip. Prices from $1406 per person (estimate).
highlights: Dalt Vila (walled old town) guided tour
VIP table at Ushuaïa or Hï Ibiza
overview: Spend 10 days discovering Ibiza, Spain — Mediterranean climate — hot, dry summers (June-September, highs 28-31°C) perfect for the beach club season, and mild, quiet winters (December-February, highs around 15-16°C) when most clubs and many restaurants close entirely. June and September offer the island's famous nightlife and beach season with noticeably lower prices and crowds than the July-August peak. This itinerary blends Dalt Vila (walled old town) guided tour, Es Vedrà boat trip, Dalt Vila walls exterior walk with free time to explore at your own pace, backed by round-trip flights, handpicked accommodation, and a dedicated travel consultant from enquiry through departure.
included: Round-trip economy-class airfare from your selected origin city (upgrade to premium economy or business available)
9 nights accommodation in your selected category (Budget, Mid-range, Premium, or Luxury)
Daily local transport as per the itinerary
Guided tours including Dalt Vila (walled old town) guided tour, Es Vedrà boat trip, Dalt Vila walls exterior walk
All entrance fees for attractions and activities listed in the itinerary
Applicable taxes and OTA service fee
Dedicated travel consultant support from booking through departure
notIncluded: Visa fees and travel document costs (see Visa Information)
Travel insurance (strongly recommended, available as an add-on)
Lunches and dinners except where noted in the itinerary
Optional activities not listed in the day-by-day itinerary
Airline seat selection and baggage upgrades
Any fare difference for premium economy or business class upgrades

itinerary.title: Arrive in Ibiza
itinerary.description: Land at Ibiza Airport (IBZ) and take your included private transfer to your hotel. After settling in, ease into the trip with a relaxed visit to Dalt Vila (walled old town) guided tour — UNESCO World Heritage Renaissance-era fortress walls overlooking the harbor. Round off the evening with a welcome dinner introducing you to local flavors.
activities: Dalt Vila (walled old town) guided tour

itinerary.title: Ibiza: Es Vedrà boat trip & Beach club day bed at Blue Marlin or Ushuaïa
itinerary.description: Morning visit to Es Vedrà boat trip — Circle the mystical uninhabited rock islet by boat, popular for sunset. In the afternoon, continue to Beach club day bed at Blue Marlin or Ushuaïa — Iconic sunset beach club experience with DJs and cocktails. Evening free to explore local restaurants and nightlife.
activities: Beach club day bed at Blue Marlin or Ushuaïa

itinerary.title: Ibiza: Hippy Market at Las Dalias & Ibiza nightclub entry (Pacha, Amnesia, Hï Ibiza)
itinerary.description: Morning visit to Hippy Market at Las Dalias — Bohemian market of handmade crafts, jewelry, and clothing (entry free, budget for shopping). In the afternoon, continue to Ibiza nightclub entry (Pacha, Amnesia, Hï Ibiza) — World-famous superclubs that put Ibiza on the electronic music map. Evening free to explore local restaurants and nightlife.
activities: Ibiza nightclub entry (Pacha, Amnesia, Hï Ibiza)

itinerary.title: Day Trip to Formentera island (ferry from Ibiza Town)
itinerary.description: Full-day excursion to Formentera island (ferry from Ibiza Town), a popular side trip from Ibiza. Return to Ibiza in the evening with time free to explore on your own.
activities: Guided day trip: Formentera island (ferry from Ibiza Town)

itinerary.title: Leisure Day & Optional Activities
itinerary.description: A lighter day to recharge, shop, or add an optional experience. Popular choices include Cala Xarraca's clay-mud coves — your consultant can book add-ons like this on request.

itinerary.title: Ibiza: Formentera day-trip ferry & Dalt Vila walls exterior walk
itinerary.description: Morning visit to Formentera day-trip ferry — Fast ferry to Ibiza's pristine, quieter sister island. In the afternoon, continue to Dalt Vila walls exterior walk — Wander the fortress ramparts and cathedral square for free. Evening free to explore local restaurants and nightlife.

itinerary.title: Day Trip to Santa Gertrudis village
itinerary.description: Full-day excursion to Santa Gertrudis village, a popular side trip from Ibiza. Return to Ibiza in the evening with time free to explore on your own.
activities: Guided day trip: Santa Gertrudis village

itinerary.title: Ibiza: Cala Comte sunset viewpoint & Es Vedrà viewpoint from the cliffs
itinerary.description: Morning visit to Cala Comte sunset viewpoint — One of the island's most photographed sunset beaches. In the afternoon, continue to Es Vedrà viewpoint from the cliffs — See the famous rock islet without a boat trip. Evening free to explore local restaurants and nightlife.
activities: Es Vedrà viewpoint from the cliffs

itinerary.title: Leisure Day & Optional Activities
itinerary.description: A lighter day to recharge, shop, or add an optional experience. Popular choices include Santa Gertrudis's bohemian village square — your consultant can book add-ons like this on request.

itinerary.title: Departure Day
itinerary.description: Enjoy a final morning at leisure — perhaps one last visit to Ibiza Town marina promenade or some souvenir shopping — before your private transfer to IBZ for your departure flight.

travelTips: Book superclub tickets (Pacha, Amnesia, Hï Ibiza) online in advance — door prices are higher and lines are long.
Rent a car or scooter to properly explore the island's beaches beyond Ibiza Town and San Antonio.
Visit in June or September for the same beach-club atmosphere at lower prices and crowds than peak summer.
Sunset at Café del Mar or Es Vedrà's viewpoint is a genuinely iconic, free experience — don't skip it.
Many clubs and restaurants close completely November through April — this is a summer-season island.
Pace yourself — this itinerary includes free time so you are not rushing between every attraction.
packingList: Copies of booking confirmations and travel insurance
Lightweight, breathable clothing and a reusable water bottle
Stylish beach-to-club outfits — Ibiza's dress culture is part of the experience
A light jacket for cooler evenings, even in summer
Comfortable sandals for Dalt Vila's cobblestones
thingsToDo: Dalt Vila (walled old town) guided tour
Beach club day bed at Blue Marlin or Ushuaïa
Ibiza nightclub entry (Pacha, Amnesia, Hï Ibiza)
Es Vedrà viewpoint from the cliffs
Jet skiing and parasailing at San Antonio Bay
thingsToAvoid: Visiting outside May-October expecting nightlife or beach clubs to be open — most close for winter.
Skipping advance beach club/nightclub reservations in July-August, when top venues sell out.
Renting a scooter without proper licensing/insurance — enforcement has tightened in recent years.
Assuming taxis are cheap — short hops can be pricier than expected, especially late at night.
topRestaurants: La Paloma — Mediterranean Organic Garden Restaurant ($$$)
Amante Beach Club — Mediterranean Cliffside Dining ($$$$)
instagramSpots: Es Vedrà at sunset from Cala d'Hort
Dalt Vila's cathedral and city walls
Ibiza Town marina with the old town backdrop
hiddenGems: Es Portitxol tiny islet off Punta Galera
adventureActivities: Jet skiing and parasailing at San Antonio Bay
luxuryExperiences: VIP table at Ushuaïa or Hï Ibiza
Private yacht charter around Es Vedrà and Formentera
Suite stay at a 5-star Dalt Vila boutique hotel
Private chef dinner at a countryside finca villa
honeymoonExperiences: Sunset at Café del Mar or Cala Comte
Private boat trip around Es Vedrà
Romantic dinner in Dalt Vila's old town
Day trip to quiet, pristine Formentera
budgetExperiences: Public beaches (Cala Comte, Cala Bassa) are free to enjoy
Dalt Vila's fortress walls and old town — free to explore
Es Vedrà cliffside viewpoint at sunset

festivalCalendar.name: Sant Bartomeu local patron saint festival

localEtiquette: Dress codes at beach clubs and nightclubs can be strict and stylish — check ahead, especially for VIP areas.
Lunch and dinner run later than much of Northern Europe — restaurants often don't fill up until 9-10pm.
Ibiza has a strong bohemian/hippie heritage (the famous hippy markets) alongside its clubbing reputation — both cultures are respected locally.
Topless sunbathing is common and accepted on many beaches, though full nudity is generally restricted to designated areas.
Noise ordinances are taken seriously outside licensed venues — residential areas expect quiet after certain hours.
localTransportGuide: Renting a car or scooter is the most practical way to reach Ibiza's scattered beaches and villages, especially outside Ibiza Town and San Antonio. Public buses connect main towns but run infrequently, especially off-season. Taxis are reliable but pricier at night; ferries connect to Formentera and mainland Spain.
bestTimeToVisit: June and September offer the island's famous nightlife and beach season with noticeably lower prices and crowds than the July-August peak.
weather: Mediterranean climate — hot, dry summers (June-September, highs 28-31°C) perfect for the beach club season, and mild, quiet winters (December-February, highs around 15-16°C) when most clubs and many restaurants close entirely.
visaInformation: US, UK, Canadian, and Australian citizens can enter visa-free under the Schengen Area rules for up to 90 days within a 180-day period. EU citizens face no restrictions. Verify current requirements against your specific passport before travel.
averageFlightTime: ~10.6h from major hubs (estimate; varies by origin — see Suggested Flights)
cancellationPolicy: Cancellations made 30+ days before departure: full refund minus a $99 processing fee. 15-29 days before departure: 50% refund. 0-14 days before departure or no-show: non-refundable. Airline and hotel supplier cancellation terms may be stricter than this policy and apply in addition — your travel consultant confirms exact terms before payment is taken. No online payment is collected on this site; a consultant confirms final pricing and availability with you directly before any booking is confirmed.
termsAndConditions: Pricing shown is per person based on the traveler type and tier selected and is an estimate pending live fare and rate confirmation.
Passports must be valid for at least 6 months beyond the return date for most destinations — confirm the exact requirement for your nationality.
Itinerary order may change due to weather, local conditions, or attraction closures; inclusions remain equivalent.
Solo travelers incur a single-room supplement, reflected in the Solo pricing tier.
This package does not include international travel insurance unless explicitly listed under Included.
Prices shown in a currency other than USD are approximate conversions at the rate noted and are not a payment quote.

faqs.question: Do I need a visa to visit Ibiza?
faqs.answer: US, UK, Canadian, and Australian citizens can enter visa-free under the Schengen Area rules for up to 90 days within a 180-day period. EU citizens face no restrictions. Verify current requirements against your specific passport before travel.

faqs.question: What is the best time to visit Ibiza?
faqs.answer: June and September offer the island's famous nightlife and beach season with noticeably lower prices and crowds than the July-August peak. Mediterranean climate — hot, dry summers (June-September, highs 28-31°C) perfect for the beach club season, and mild, quiet winters (December-February, highs around 15-16°C) when most clubs and many restaurants close entirely.

faqs.question: What's included in this package?
faqs.answer: Round-trip airfare, accommodation, daily breakfast, airport transfers, daily local transport, and guided tours to the attractions listed in the itinerary. See the Included / Not Included sections for full detail.

faqs.question: Can the itinerary be customized?
faqs.answer: Yes — this itinerary is a starting point. Your travel consultant can add, remove, or reorder activities, extend your stay, or upgrade your hotel category before you book.

faqs.question: What is the cancellation policy?
faqs.answer: Cancellations made 30+ days before departure: full refund minus a $99 processing fee. 15-29 days before departure: 50% refund. 0-14 days before departure or no-show: non-refundable. Airline and hotel supplier cancellation terms may be stricter than this policy and apply in addition — your travel consultant confirms exact terms before payment is taken. No online payment is collected on this site; a consultant confirms final pricing and availability with you directly before any booking is confirmed.

faqs.question: Is Ibiza safe for tourists?
faqs.answer: Ibiza is generally safe for tourists who take standard precautions — avoid poorly lit areas at night, keep valuables secure, and use licensed transport.

faqs.question: What currency should I bring to Ibiza?
faqs.answer: The local currency is EUR. Cards and mobile payments are widely accepted, and ATMs are easy to find.

faqs.question: Is this package good for a honeymoon or family trip?
faqs.answer: This itinerary suits couples, solo travelers, and small groups equally well — talk to your consultant about tailoring it further.

reviews.author: Chen Costa
reviews.title: A little rushed but still wonderful
reviews.body: Booked this as a solo trip and it was well paced. Ibiza Town marina promenade in particular stood out. A couple of the transfers ran a little late but nothing that spoiled the trip.

reviews.author: Lucas Sharma
reviews.title: Luxury without the hassle
reviews.body: Everything was handled for us — flights, hotel, transfers, and tours to Ibiza Town marina promenade and Es Vedrà boat trip. Great communication from the consultant before departure too.

reviews.author: Tom Botha
reviews.title: Solid mid-range package
reviews.body: We added a couple of optional activities beyond Hippy Market at Las Dalias and don't regret it. Good value for what was included, and the food recommendations from our guide were spot on.

reviews.author: Arjun Kim
reviews.title: Great for families with kids
